ddls:
CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who placed the order */,
  "order_priority" TEXT /* Priority of the order (e.g., High, Low) */,
  "order_quantity" INTEGER /* Total quantity of items in the order */,
  "sales" REAL /* Total sales amount of the order */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount applied to the order */,
  "ship_mode" TEXT /* Shipping method used for the order */,
  "profit" REAL /* Profit gained from the order */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Price per unit of the product */,
  "shipping_cost" REAL /* Cost of shipping the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was placed */,
  "expected_delivery_date" TEXT /* Expected date of delivery */,
  "actual_delivery_date" TEXT /* Actual date of delivery */,
  "order_status" TEXT /* Current status of the order (e.g., Pending, Shipped, Delivered, Cancelled) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the order */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the order */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_last_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "province" TEXT /* Province of the customer */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region of the customer */,
  "customer_segment" TEXT /* Segment of the customer (e.g., Consumer, Corporate) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address_line_1" TEXT /* First line of the customer's address */,
  "address_line_2" TEXT /* Second line of the customer's address */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the customer */,
  "postal_code" TEXT /* Postal code of the customer */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "loyalty_points" INTEGER /* Loyalty points accumulated by the customer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the customer record was created */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_category" TEXT /* Category of the product (e.g., Office Supplies) */,
  "product_sub_category" TEXT /* Sub-category of the product (e.g., Appliances) */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "product_container" TEXT /* Type of container for the product (e.g., Large Box) */,
  "product_base_margin" REAL /* Base profit margin for the product */,
  "product_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the product */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier for the product */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the product */,
  "dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the product (e.g., 10x10x10 cm) */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the product */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material of the product */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the product record was created */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated order */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product ordered */,
  "quantity_ordered" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "price_each" REAL /* Selling price of each product */,
  "unit_cost" REAL /* Cost price of each product */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost price for the quantity ordered */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the order item was created */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipping" (
  "shipping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipping event */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated order */,
  "shipping_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was shipped */,
  "tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number for the shipment */,
  "shipping_status" TEXT /* Current status of the shipment (e.g., In Transit, Delivered) */,
  "shipping_address_line_1" TEXT /* First line of the shipping address */,
  "shipping_address_line_2" TEXT /* Second line of the shipping address */,
  "shipping_city" TEXT /* City of the shipping address */,
  "shipping_postal_code" TEXT /* Postal code of the shipping address */,
  "shipping_country" TEXT /* Country of the shipping address */,
  "carrier" TEXT /* Carrier used for shipping */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the shipping record was created */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipping_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "discounts" (
  "discount_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each discount */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the discount */,
  "discount_percentage" REAL /* Percentage discount applied */,
  "valid_until" TEXT /* Expiration date of the discount */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the discount */,
  "minimum_spend" REAL /* Minimum spend required to apply the discount */,
  "maximum_discount_amount" REAL /* Maximum discount amount that can be applied */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the discount record was created */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("discount_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated order */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date when the payment was made */,
  "amount_paid" REAL /* Total amount paid for the order */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment used (e.g., Credit Card, PayPal) */,
  "card_type" TEXT /* Type of payment card used (e.g., Visa, MasterCard) */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* Transaction ID from the payment processor */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the payment record was created */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payment_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for inventory record */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated product */,
  "stock_level" INTEGER /* Current stock level of the product */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level for the product */,
  "reorder_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity to reorder when stock falls below the reorder level */,
  "last_stock_check_date" TEXT /* Date of the last stock check */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the inventory record was created */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "returns" (
  "return_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each return record */,
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated order item */,
  "return_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the return */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date when the return was processed */,
  "refund_amount" REAL /* Amount refunded to the customer */,
  "return_condition" TEXT /* Condition of the returned item (e.g., New, Used) */,
  "return_reason_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the return reason */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the return record was created */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("return_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_order_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_item_id") REFERENCES order_items ("order_item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer providing feedback */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order related to the feedback */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the customer (1-5) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments provided by the customer */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was provided */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product related to the feedback */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the feedback record was created */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics record */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated order */,
  "sales_date" TEXT /* Date of sales entry */,
  "total_sales" REAL /* Total sales amount */,
  "total_profit" REAL /* Total profit from the order */,
  "customer_segment" TEXT /* Segment of the customer (e.g., Consumer, Corporate) */,
  "product_category" TEXT /* Category of the product */,
  "product_sub_category" TEXT /* Sub-category of the product */,
  "order_priority" TEXT /* Priority of the order */,
  "ship_mode" TEXT /* Shipping method used */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the analytics record was created */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Admin, Customer Service) */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role's responsibilities */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role record was created */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user account is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was created */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)
